projectDescription: FLORA is an AI-powered creative workflow platform featuring a node-based infinite canvas that connects 50+ AI models across text, image, video, and audio into scalable, professional pipelines.
keyFeatures: Node-based infinite canvas connecting 50+ AI models
FAUNA AI agent — creative co-pilot for building and editing workflows
Elements — reusable visual identity references for consistent brand/character generation
Timeline Editor — full multi-track video editor built into the canvas
Technique Builder — package workflows into reusable, shareable recipes
Batch Node — parallel 'for-each' processing across images, videos, and text
Layer Editor — professional compositing tool for multi-layer image composition
Real-time multiplayer collaboration on the canvas
Inpainting and Outpainting tools for precise image editing
Google Drive integration for import and export
App Mode — run Techniques as standalone streamlined interfaces
Teams and Organizations with pooled usage budgets
Full API and MCP integration (Starter plan and above)
publicApiSurface: NLE export formats: EDL, FCP7 XML, FCPXML
Export formats: PNG, JPG, WEBP, SVG, MP4, MOV, GIF, MP3, WAV, AAC, FLAC
